creator: chris@maytownsend.co.uk
text:
Created attachment 212076
python3 support + revision bump

Since this is the last version with python 2 support, im submitting the tiny change to allow python3 support. 

I've submitted 2 other tickets for the 2 deps that dont have py3 support yet and ill link them to the ticket. Not sure if this will need a revision bump or not for the version. I'll assume yes and also assume this will be merged after the version bump in 244528.
